decrease_confirm: Are you sure you want to go back (decrease) the count?
request_description: Share your personal intention with the community in prayer and trust it to the Mother of God.
river_prayer: Together, we are building a river of prayer
choose_appearance_language: Choose how the app looks and the language for your prayers. You can always change this later from your profile.
change_anytime_profile: You can change appearance & language anytime from Profile → Settings.
onboarding_welcome_desc: A sacred space to count your rosaries and join a global community united in prayer.
onboarding_count_desc: Use the Home screen to count each rosary bead with the Rosary or Divine Mercy Chaplet. Tap to count, save when done.
onboarding_community_desc: See how many rosaries our community has offered together worldwide. Your prayers contribute to our collective goal.
onboarding_intentions_desc: Submit your personal prayer requests and share your spiritual intentions with the community.
onboarding_priest_desc: Spiritually support a priest through prayer. Select up to three priests for a personal spiritual partnership.
onboarding_prayers_desc: Access the Divine Mercy Chaplet, Way of the Cross, Novenas, and daily guides — all in one place.
onboarding_profile_desc: Track your personal prayer statistics, manage your account, and customise your experience.
